feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Business Rule Framework (BRFplus)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Business Rule Framework (BRFplus) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Determination output error
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I have this error when i set up the output, the channel is Email.

please advice

entry.title: BRF+ Issue
entry.content:
Champions

We have using output forms(BRF+) for contract when the contract is created earlier it was generating the PDF output after saving  .Initial  status of the output will be In Preparation & after few seconds the status will automatically change to completed.

But recently this is not happening i have compared  the config in QAS/PRD they are similar.

What might be the issue in not generating the output .

I get a warning msg No output device defined

Inputs will be helpful to fix the issue

entry.title: MDG-M Autoapprove Step if no approver found
entry.content:
Hi!

We are using Dynmic agent call badi to dynamically retrieve approvers. Some steps are conditional and depends on Custom fields. So Badi checks if step applies or not. 

We need that if step is not applicable->got autoapproved or follow to next step. How to set auto-approval and continue to next step? ( if no approver set in badi, workflow get stuck). How to skit step and go to next ?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Activate and view lean BRF+ trace
entry.content:
Hello,

Can some one please help me with steps to switch 'ON' lean trace for BRF+ and how to view the same.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Kartik

entry.title: Output Parameter Determination - Document in multiple languages
entry.content:
Hi,

My client has the requirement to have the invoice (and other documents) send to the recipient in multiple languages. So e.g. when the customer is based in Spain, the invoice has to be send in English and in Spanish.

I have tried to configure this in Output Parameter Determination, but no luck so far.

Is it possible to configure this in Output Parameter Determination? SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

KR

entry.title: Change content of BRFplus structure with procedure call
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a rule (RUL_ENH_MAT) in BRFplus which has structure Z_MAT_CUST_INFO which has some substructures.

In that rule I have a procedure call and in that procedure call I call a static method in a class where I basically have some complex logic to update some fields in some substructures of structure Z_MAT_CUST_INFO. 

In that class/method I have Z_MAT_CUST_INFO as changing parameter and in the procedure call I have Z_MAT_CUST_INFO as result, but somehow when executing the rule, Z_MAT_CUST_INFO does not get updated (but it does when simulating the procedure call).

Any idea?

Thank you

entry.title: How to cancel service order via dunning when payment made balance 0.00?
entry.content:
We are using BRF+ for our new implementation.  The design has been built to cancel service, field orders and disc doc when a payment has been made.  This appears to be working EXCEPT when a full payment is made while the order is open.  Is there an event that is triggered during dunning even if there are no open items on the account?  

Thank you

entry.title: Mass printing transaction VF31F disabled
entry.content:
Dear all,

At the client I am working with, there is a user who was using the VF31F transaction to do mass printing and after the SAP S/4Hana version update, the transaction was disabled by SAP.

Has anyone experienced the same situation? If so, what alternative solution did they apply so that the users could continue to print massively?

In my user's case, he executed transaction VF31F and the transaction already downloaded the invoice document in PDF format to a local folder on his computer.

entry.title: S/4HANA PCE different ADS connection for output management
entry.content:
Hello all,

our customer is going to use ADS on BTP and therefore configured a new RFC destination ADS_HEC.

Yet we are receiving output errors when creating POs. It seems that BRF+ is still using ADS.

Is it somehow possible to switch to a different ADS connection in BRF+?

thx.

 

Br,

Ralph

entry.title: BRF+ giving dump
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using BRF+ in a badi but whenever decision table content is edited after activating that table when my badi is executed its giving dump 'Statement "MODIFY <dbtab>" is not allowed with this status.' There is probably an error in the program"SAPLSEOC".Execution takes place in a transactional context: A "CALL <functional> BAdi name" call isactive. The current statement "MODIFY <dbtab>" is therefore forbidden. but the same brf+ will work fine when it's called inside a class. I'm using cl_fdt_function_process=>process to call brf+ function.

Kindly help me with this issue.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: BRF+ outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello all,

 

Is the outbound_delivery  available for  BRF+ output management?

 

The object outbound_delivery can be activated for BRF+, but the scenario can’t be found in Transaction OPD (BRF+ message types).

We downloaded the latest scenarios from https://me.sap.com/notes/2248229, but there is still no scenario for outbound delivery.

 

thx.

 

Br

Ralph

entry.title: BRF+ data Validation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have BRF+ table where i created decision table with three columns plant, profit center and indicator.

I have a condition for a PLANT and ACTIVE X indicator combination if the value already exists in decision table it should throw an error when user tries to create the same entry.

Input Fields = PLANT, INDICATOR

Output Fields = PROFIT CENTER

1)Plantprofit centreIndicator 
 Plant 11X 
 Plant 12XError - profit centre already active for this plant
     
     
     
2)Plantprofit centreIndicator 
 Plant 11X 
 Plant 21XPossible

I tried using Rule Set and Custom Exit but unable to validate existing entries using loop.

I am new to BRF+ Concept so any help would be appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to create a BRF+ rule to check date?
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I am facing with a BRF+ issue which is about to validate a date.
The date cannot be more than 1 year from now.

For example:
The date is: 10.04.2026 and it must fail because is more than 02.05.2025.

I've tried to create an expression but did not succed.

Thanks for your help! 🙂

entry.title: BRF+
entry.content:
How to create BRF+ application in S/4HANA cloud?

 

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: BRF+ Issue
entry.content:
Team

We are using BRF+ for PO output when the PO is created the output is generated successfully. When the data is changed in the PO   for ex like price , qty payment terms the changes are not getting reflected in the PO output also new output is not getting generated or not updating the in old output which was created during create mode.

How to fix the issue

1.How to capture the new changes in the old output form or create a new output from with new data

entry.title: BRF+ in S/4 HANA Public Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Public Cloud Experts, 

We have developed multiple BRF+ applications in our current On-Premise Landscape for forms and other custom RAP applications . Now we are looking at moving some of our custom to Cloud . When we build Custom BRF+ applications using the BRF+ application in the starter tenant and when i try to call the BRF+ application using the class cl_fdt_function_process class the get the error that the class is not permitted in the cloud .

Can you anyone guide me how to access BRF+ applications from Public cloud Developer Extensionsibilty ?

 

Thanks,

Vijaya

entry.title: BRFPLus in Development Client, but would need to test in 300
entry.content:
Hi Community

I not able to find my personal notes how i have resolved this in the past

I have created a BRFPlus Customizing table/Application in 110 client.
The testing is done in 300, 
The transport is a workbench. While testing in 300, i get an exception :


The BRFplus application is not available in 300 too. 
Can you please help with this query
I have used FDT Helpers in the past to package the BRFPlus but to transport to QA later to Production, this time i am lost
SCC1 does not work, since this is a workbench request

entry.title: Create CR type dumps internally at CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL
entry.content:
Scenario: 'Create change Request type and activate 

Standard code dumps at select statement when joining FDT_ADMN_000 , FDT_RSTL_0000 with the version table FDT_ADMN_0030 We could not find the object id causing this dump

Dump :  Any one faced dump DBSQL_TABLE_UNKNOWN CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB in the standard class CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL GET_FUNCTIONS_FOR_RULESETS line 112, please let us know any suggestions regarding this or any latest sap note to solve this.

Environment : S4HANA

Thanks !

entry.title: I am configuring BRF+ Output and i would need help maintaining output relevance as condition records
entry.content:
I am configuring BRF+ Output and I would need help with maintaining output relevance as condition records for the users where some users might require email and some Print.

Like we maintain condition records in VV11 with Key Combinations do we have anything  which is easy to maintain and monitoring them.

entry.title: In OPD I'm trying to find the email recipient table in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm inside OPD and I'd like to find the tables that contains the email recipient list.

I see the table RES_T_DEC_TAB_EMAIL_RECEIVER_1 in OPD but I'm unable to find it in SAP S4

My goal is to schedule an extraction from this table.

Thanks,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
